name: M. Umair Raza
summary: Systems Engineering professional with 15+ years of experience across aerospace and defense programs, spanning avionics & mission system design, integration, qualification, certification, airworthiness, production, and lifecycle sustainment. Extensive background in MBSE-driven techniques and systems integration. PMP and PMI-ACP certified.

experience.company: College of Aeronautical Engineering & NUTECH University
experience.employer: Pakistan Air Force / Higher Education Commission
experience.title: Program Lead, Professional Education
bullets: Leadership in transformative programs (Capacity Building initiative by the Higher Education Commission, Pakistan)
Led the integration of 60+ Aerospace and defense projects across multi-disciplinary engineering teams
Strong product management in Data, AI, AI/ML lifecycle, analytics, Power BI (KPIs, ROIs)

experience.title: Deputy Director, Program Management Office
bullets: Led configuration management and integration of Aero Systems across fixed-wing and UAV platforms
Conducted FMECA, LORA, and RCM analyses that improved fleet serviceability to >90%
Delivered hands-on field leadership across airworthiness compliance, lifecycle supportability, system integration, and testing through flight-test phases
Wrote Risk mitigation plans, RAID logs, and EVM reporting
Led requirements & stakeholder analysis to translate Air Force operational needs
Developed and managed Acceptance Test Requirements (ATRs) and verification/test specifications
Executed integration and validation testing of avionics subsystems on an advanced aircraft design/integration rig

experience.title: Lead Systems Integration Expert
bullets: Delivered flight-line maintenance and sustainment support - fault isolation, real-time troubleshooting, and corrective action planning
Performed reliability (MMTR, MTTF) and trend analysis, optimized staggered and preventive maintenance plans
Improved mission availability and aircraft uptime

experience.company: Airborne Warning & Control Systems, Air Force
experience.title: Maintenance Support Engineer (AEW&C)
bullets: Airborne Warning & Control Systems Engineer for the Air Force

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Designed, developed, and qualified a mission-critical aircraft sub-system; successfully integrated into operational fleet
Led the design, planning, and upgrade of the country's first legacy trainer aircraft with a glass cockpit, enhancing pilot training capabilities
